2.5D Platform Fighter

Anime Aggressors

Rollback-first deterministic combat rendered in Three.js. Keyboard and gamepads are first-class; Edge-IO wearables are an optional input layer.

Play Match Training Mode Controller Test Rollback Debug Edge-IO Lab Impact Dummy Derby Prototype Lab

Ship gates

  • PLAYABLE — 2-player local match + Impact Dummy Derby
  • PROVEN BY TEST — game-core, rollback, netplay loopback
  • SHIP BLOCKED — public online relay, final art, hardware BLE verify

See docs/STATUS.md for the full capability matrix.
